headline: 3 Truck Stocks Holding Ground Despite Industry Challenges
summary: The Zacks Transportation-Truck industry is suffering mainly due to lackluster freight demand. We believe stocks like ODFL, JBHT and KNX are better positioned to escape industry challenges.
